_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify information technology (IT) security program implications of new technologies or technology upgrades.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to evaluate the regulatory implications of proposed data processing activities, AI system deployments, or business model changes, providing compliance risk assessment before implementation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-A-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-003 (SP, cosine: 0.521), SP-T-010 (SP, cosine: 0.465).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.533). Shared vocabulary: [implications]. DCWF-only terms [identify, information, new, program, security, technologies] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, activities, ai, assessment, business, changes] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.875, R=0.876). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 24-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Identify information technology (IT) security program implications of new techno" and "Ability to evaluate the regulatory implications of proposed data processing acti" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.534 ≈ STS 0.533 (gap 0.001). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [implications] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [implications]. DCWF-only: [identify, information, new, program, security, technologies]. WIDAI-only: [ability, activities, ai, assessment, business, changes].
